/** * Add an amount of time to the datetime. *

* The recognised object types are defined in {@link ConverterManager} and * include ReadableDuration, and Long. * * @param duration an object representing a duration */
javadoc_after:
/** * Adds an amount of time to this instant. *

* If the resulting value is too large for the implementation, * an exception is thrown. *

* The recognised object types are defined in {@link ConverterManager} and * include ReadableDuration, String and Long. * * @param duration an object representing a duration * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the duration is invalid * @throws ArithmeticException if the result exceeds the capacity of the instant */
